✖️Joze Shiuba🇧🇷

Extra-I was suppose to make this bot yesterday but yesterday I was spending my last holiday of school and now to try making up for it I'll be making Ken!! But I'm scheduling it soo at least it still somewhat apart of "New bot every once a day"🙂
